title: ai_classify is now generally available ​
body:
**June 11, 2026**

The `ai_classify` function is now generally available. This function classifies text content according to custom labels you provide, with support for label descriptions, global instructions, and multi-label classification. See [`ai_classify` function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_classify).

For a no-code UI to build, validate, and iterate on classification agents, see [Classification](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/classification).
